section_miscategorizations.reason: The note earlier states the patient was already given metformin in the ER; without explicit wording that this is a new or adjusted prescription, this reads as continuation of an existing home medication, which by guideline belongs in S unless clearly framed as a treatment change.

This appears to reference an existing antiseizure regimen rather than a new order or change; per instructions, current medications already being taken belong in S unless clearly framed as a new or modified management action.
